title: Nuka-Cola Potions
description: Replaces most potions with Nuka-Cola from fallout.
body:
Changes Potions to Nuka-Cola from Fallout

Should work with mods as long as it shares the potion texture

Does not include Brewing Stand or Experience Bottle

Nuka is Regular, Quantum is Splash, Cherry is Lingering.

Contains edited textures from the [Fallout Mash-Up Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fallout-mashup)

My first upload, mainly to get used to the publishing tools.
